Off Calendar Apr-28-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ENVIRONMENTAL HEALTH'S Motion for Court Approval and Entry of Consent Judgment. Appearances: Lisa Burger, Esq. of the Lexington Law Group (415) 759-4111, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party. Catherine A. Allen Esq., of Hunton & Williams, (213) 532-2000, Appearing thru CourtCall, appearing for Defendant E.S. Originals; Kent J. Schmidt, Esq. of Dorsey & Whitney LLP, (949) 932-3600, Appearing thru CourtCall, appearing for Defendant Global design Concepts. This matter is not being contested. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: MOTION GRANTED. Order Granting Plaintiff's motion for Court Approval and entry of Consent Judgments signed in Open Court. Consent Judgment re: E.S. Originals, Inc. signed in open Court; Consent Judgment re: Global Design Concepts, Inc. signed in open Court; and, Consent Judgment re: L'Egent International Ltd., signed in open Court.(302/CWW/VC)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
